steps: File tax reclaim with ATO for BHP Group dividend citing AU-NO treaty 15% rate vs 25% withheld
Submit Form NAT 3157 with evidence of Norwegian tax residency for CLIENT10
Request Citigroup Australia provide dividend payment confirmation and tax withholding details
Follow up with Skatteetaten for reciprocal treaty confirmation if ATO requires additional documentation
